title: giliastrum purpusii
intro: Giliastrum purpusii, also known as Mexican beebalm, is a flowering plant native to Mexico. It is a member of the Lamiaceae family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has various health benefits, including the ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy. Giliastrum purpusii is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or mixing them with a solvent like ethanol.
